activate_when: The user asks to end, close, wrap up, or hand off an agent session.
The user asks for a final session summary with validation evidence.
The user asks to update tasklog or changelog at the end of an agent session.
The workflow requires a ReleasePacket, guardian decision, or next-session handoff.
do_not_activate_when: The user asks to clean temporary files, format code, or remove unused assets without a session-closeout intent.
The user asks for a generic project summary unrelated to the active session.
The request belongs to pre-compaction, session start, tasklog management, or changelog management as the primary active skill.
required_context: commands run or explicit statement that no commands ran
validation, PR, CI, merge, and blocker state when those claims are requested
fallback: If required context is missing, produce a gap-aware closeout and block any completion claim that depends on missing evidence.
